name: Spareribs- Cabbage 'n Kraut
recipeIngredient: 1 t Caraway seeds or 1 t Dill
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle salt and pepper on the pork spare ribs.
2. Brown the ribs in a heavy skillet or broiler pan for 30 minutes.
3. Layer the cooked ribs alternately with sauerkraut, cabbage, onion, and apple in a crock pot.
4. Add caraway seeds or dill to the water and pour over all ingredients.
5. Cover the crock pot and cook on low for 6-8 hours (or high for 4-5 hours).
6. Stir several times during cooking if using the high setting only.
Note: The recipe can be prepared using all sauerkraut or all cabbage if desired.
